item.title: bytedance/lightseq
item.description: LightSeq: A High Performance Library for Sequence Processing and Generation

item.title: tensorflow/recommenders-addons
item.description: Additional utils and helpers to extend TensorFlow when build recommendation systems, contributed and maintained by SIG Recommenders.

item.title: leoxiaobin/deep-high-resolution-net.pytorch
item.description: The project is an official implementation of our CVPR2019 paper "Deep High-Resolution Representation Learning for Human Pose Estimation"

item.description: Code for KiloNeRF: Speeding up Neural Radiance Fields with Thousands of Tiny MLPs
